nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Minimal project README containing only the TEMO.AI title heading; serves as the repository entry-point document without further content.

nodes.name: TEMO.AI.csproj
nodes.summary: MSBuild project file for the TEMO.AI WPF/.NET 9 Windows desktop app, enabling WPF and WinForms, importing AppVersion.props, setting the Program startup object, and referencing WebView2, SkiaSharp, Svg.Skia, and Velopack packages.
nodes.languageNotes: Targets net9.0-windows with PublishSingleFile-friendly content handling for install-node.bat and self-contained packaging via Velopack.

nodes.name: build-velopack.bat
nodes.summary: Windows batch release script that reads the version from AppVersion.props, runs dotnet publish as a self-contained single-file win-x64 build, then packs and optionally uploads a Velopack release to GitHub.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses delayed expansion and an inline PowerShell call to parse the AppVersion XML element; gates GitHub upload on the GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable.

nodes.name: install-node.bat
nodes.summary: Small Windows batch helper that installs the Node.js LTS runtime silently via winget, exiting early if winget is unavailable.
